name: FreelanceOpportunity
description: A discovered or manually entered freelance job opportunity.

source_url.description: Direct URL to the job posting

client_name.description: Name or identifier of the client

estimated_time.description: Estimated time to complete (e.g. '2 hours', '3 days')

skill_level.description: Required expertise level (e.g. entry, intermediate, expert)

autopilot_compatibility.description: How well Autopilot can handle this (high, medium, low)

platform_rules.description: Specific rules or constraints for this platform

skill_match_score.description: Calculated score 0-100 based on Clone Bay identity

identity_fit_notes.description: Notes on why this job fits or doesn't fit the user

status.description: discovered | reviewing | mission_queued | approved_to_apply | applied | won | rejected | archived

linked_mission_id.description: ID of the associated Action Engine mission

linked_application_id.description: ID of the associated application record
